_note: JANKUTrainedChenkinNoobai_v777 (NoobAI-family anime checkpoint), BOORU register: quality tags (masterpiece / best quality / very aesthetic / absurdres) + FLAT anime coloring (cel shading, flat color, clean line art, vibrant palette). OWNER-VALIDATED register (acceptance batch ComfyUI 00226-00229): euler_ancestral / normal / 26 / cfg 3.5. cfg 3.5 (NOT 4.0 — a mis-picked trial) is the register that reads clothed / human-eared / warm.
_defect_history: v3 painterly styleVocab (removed) read western-comic + a red/gold monochrome wash. v4 spoke JANKU's flat anime dialect + killed the single-color background field. v5 folds the owner's kitchen-validated lessons: the widened kemonomimi/animal-ear suppression (JANKU's anime bias grafts cat/bunny ears onto humans), a wardrobe floor (no shirtless), and warm-color character positives (anti-washout face). kemonomimi/wardrobe/color are HUMAN-only (humanNegative + characterVocab) so animal creatures keep their real ears.
_weighting_note: Heavy weights on STYLE/PALETTE tokens ((anime:1.3), (realistic:1.4), 1.5-1.6 negatives) COLLAPSE JANKU to a single-color wash — never weight those. But MODERATE weights on SPECIFIC object suppression are safe and owner-validated: (animal ears:1.4) held the palette in the accepted batch while killing the kemonomimi bias. Suppress objects with weight; describe style unweighted.
